headline: Ecolab Buys CoolIT Systems for $4.75 Billion. It’s All About AI for the Struggling Stock.
summary: Ecolab  agreed to buy liquid cooling company CoolIT Systems in an all-cash deal worth $4.75 billion, broadening its exposure to the artificial-intelligence boom.  CoolIT focuses exclusively on liquid cooling solutions for data centers, which use the technology to keep fragile computing hardware operating.  Ecolab  the Minnesota-based water services company, said the acquisition will bolster its cooling offerings for data center operators, which are increasingly shifting to liquid cooling from air.

headline: Ecolab to buy CoolIT for $4.75 billion to tap into AI data center boom
summary: Ecolab said on Friday it would acquire CoolIT Systems from KKR for about $4.75 billion ‌in cash, as the water solutions firm seeks ‌to capitalize on surging demand for liquid cooling in artificial intelligence-driven data ​centers.  Owned by funds managed by KKR, CoolIT ⁠designs and manufactures liquid cooling systems used by hyperscale and colocation operators.  Ecolab expects CoolIT’s hardware ​and thermal engineering to ‌complement its own strengths in water, chemistry and digital monitoring, helping it turn into a more complete provider of cooling and fluid management.

raw.headline: Ecolab to buy CoolIT for $4.75 billion to tap into AI data center boom
raw.summary: Ecolab said on Friday it would acquire CoolIT Systems from KKR for about $4.75 billion ‌in cash, as the water solutions firm seeks ‌to capitalize on surging demand for liquid cooling in artificial intelligence-driven data ​centers.  Owned by funds managed by KKR, CoolIT ⁠designs and manufactures liquid cooling systems used by hyperscale and colocation operators.  Ecolab expects CoolIT’s hardware ​and thermal engineering to ‌complement its own strengths in water, chemistry and digital monitoring, helping it turn into a more complete provider of cooling and fluid management.

headline: Ecolab to Acquire CoolIT Systems, a Global Leader in Advanced Liquid Cooling for Next-Gen AI Data Centers
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., March 20, 2026--Ecolab announced today that it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire CoolIT Systems, a high-growth, high-margin leader in liquid cooling technology for next-gen AI data centers. CoolIT is expected to generate approximately $550 million in sales over the next 12 months. With CoolIT’s rapid sales growth, the acquisition is expected to significantly strengthen the company’s Global High-Tech growth engine and accelerate Global Water’s organic sales growt
